name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: Pittsburgh's ACE Cash Express at 722 Penn Ave provides payday and title loans with same-day service.
description_long:
Located at 722 Penn Ave in the heart of Pittsburgh, PA, ACE Cash Express operates as a standalone storefront offering immediate access to payday and title loan services. This Pittsburgh branch maintains extended weekday hours (9 AM–8 PM Monday through Friday) and Saturday availability (9 AM–7 PM), with Sunday closures. The downtown Pittsburgh location serves residents and workers throughout the surrounding area.

At this Pittsburgh storefront, you can apply for payday loans, title loans, and cash advances. Contact the 722 Penn Ave location at +1 412-247-9837 to discuss your loan options and requirements. Staff members are available during business hours to explain terms and process your application.

Before visiting, bring a valid photo ID, recent pay stub or bank statement, and information about your checking account. Quick cash from ACE Cash Express can help bridge unexpected expenses or emergency needs.
pros: Multiple service offerings including installment loans, title loans, check cashing, and money transfers at single locations
Same-day or next-day funding available for emergency cash needs
Established multi-state store network providing in-person service and accessibility
Online loan options supplementing physical store locations
Dedicated customer service with multiple contact methods (phone and email)
Business services available in addition to consumer products
Tax services offered at select locations
cons: Specific loan products are not available in all states (Colorado location pages show state restrictions)
Website pages contain 404 errors affecting information accessibility
Physical locations may experience temporary closures due to external events
Limited transparency in website content about specific rates, terms, or eligibility requirements
Service availability appears inconsistent across different states and locations
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash ($100-$1,000) with same-day or next-day access
Vehicle owners who can use title loans as collateral for emergency funds
People without bank accounts seeking check cashing and money transfer services
Consumers in states where ACE products are fully available and compliant
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for consumers facing immediate cash shortfalls who have access to a physical location or can qualify for online loans in their state. The main caveat is that product availability is state-specific and inconsistent—consumers should verify which ACE products are legal and available in their state before applying, as the website indicates certain loan types are restricted in specific states like Colorado.
meta_description: ACE Cash Express at 722 Penn Ave, Pittsburgh, PA. Payday and title loans with same-day service.
